programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: A charming film director using Aunty Lee's Delights as a shooting location may not be what he seems. Can Aunty Lee and Cherril expose him before he strikes again?

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: After being cut from the U.S.A. softball team and feeling a bit past her prime, Lisa finds herself evaluating her life and in the middle of a love triangle, as a corporate guy in crisis competes with her current, baseball-playing beau.

programme.title: An Audience With Kylie
programme.desc: Global icon Kylie Minogue takes to the stage at London's Royal Albert Hall for the biggest Audience with... to date. Join Kylie as she looks back on the highlights of her five decades in showbiz, performs a dazzling array of her greatest hits and current floor-fillers, and answers questions from the specially invited VIP guests.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Mexico have home support for the third time at a World Cup, Uzbekistan are on tournament debut, while Christian Pulisic will carry the weight of expectation for the USA.

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: A talent scout has come to town and is looking for a new member for his music and dance troupe. Cherry is obsessed with finding him and takes every opportunity to perform for anyone who will watch. But when her obsession puts her friends in danger, she must act fast to save them. Red Man challenges Green Man to become the official Ollipolis safety mascot. However things get out of control and they have to work together to stop The Imp from stealing a priceless go-kart.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: A game of 'Grannies' is fun, until Bingo and Bluey can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they'll need to video call their Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies. Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S3
programme.desc: Gnomes plant flowers, but the squirrels dig them up for some reason! Farmer Haywire needs to make 8 pancakes for 8 visiting gnomes, but he doesn't know the right amount of ingredients to use.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: MoMonsters S2
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of five monsters, Haha, Hehe, Hihi, Hoho, and Huhu, who learn the activities that kids love the most around the world. They attend the Momonsters Academy, where every day a different little boy or girl demonstrates for them his or her favorite activity.

programme.title: Minibods

programme.title: Johnny Test S5
programme.desc: The adventures of average suburban boy Johnny Test, who wittingly plays test subject for his genius twin sisters' various experiments, reluctantly fighting evil villains in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark S2
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: Viking Skool
programme.desc: Three young students, Erik, Ylva and Arni, embark on challenging and thrilling adventures while they train to become glorious Viking warriors.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: A charming film director using Aunty Lee's Delights as a shooting location may not be what he seems. Can Aunty Lee and Cherril expose him before he strikes again?

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Julius tips off Louis about Celia's plan to set him up with Madeline. Zara starts to realise something is up with her phone when Adina seems able to anticipate her every move.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Canada welcome the world for the first time, Jordan reach the finals for the first time, and Son Heung-min is a born leader for South Korea.

programme.title: Mark Moriarty: Off Duty Chef - Series 3
programme.desc: From how to cook fish perfectly to balancing flavours and reimagining leftovers to save money and reduce waste, the new series will see Mark share a whole new set of recipes.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The Catch
programme.desc: In this brand new, adventurous and mouth-watering series FOUR of Singapore's top chefs swap their high-society-city kitchens for Western Australia's rugged landscapes and stunning food producing regions teaming up with 4 West Australian chefs to actually catch the produce. Let the culinary culture clash commence!

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: When Derek the Killer Director realises Cherril has seen through his carefully crafted façade, he decides the only way out is to silence his enemies.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: We're back in Southeast Asia this week with a relaxing trip to Kuching! Join Ann Nicole as we watch her frolic with cats, take a boat ride, discover delectable foods and bring out her inner adventurer!

programme.title: Scene City: Office Incognita
programme.desc: Ever since the passing of her late husband five years ago, 65-year-old Beatrice started working as a cleaner at a financial advisory firm. At work, her teal blue uniform blends perfectly into the bleak and sterile backdrop of the corporate milieu. Most office workers pay her no heed unless her service is required --- which normally means spilled coffee or clogged toilets. Otherwise, her presence is virtually non-existent to all but a new temporary employee, Gwen, who never fails to greet her.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1
programme.desc: Watson and the team are faced with an impossible choice when two lives hang in the balance, but they only have one vial of antidote available. Meanwhile, Shinwell races to help the team, and Watson goes head to head with Moriarty.

programme.title: The Cube Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights

programme.title: 千年陕菜 (第二季)
programme.desc: 千年陕菜围绕陕菜有哪些这一主题展开陕北关中陕南等地的美食悉数登场从古都深宫中传下的珍馐到市井街角里刷屏的小吃流转千年的味道从不被尊卑观念所束缚只因它们同样有着绵长的历史美食表面的热烈背后是一类食材一门技艺一段历史一脉血缘的集体作用行走三秦大地围坐民间老席在烟火生活中呈现陕菜饮食文化的历史长卷和陕西人的生活长卷.
